questions.question: What sport or activity is the person performing on the snow-covered surface?
questions.answer_key: Skiing down a snowy slope at night
questions.rationale: Main action in high-need window (0-3s); establishes core activity and setting for entire clip

questions.question: Describe the lighting conditions and time of day for this skiing activity.
questions.answer_key: Nighttime skiing with artificial floodlights illuminating the slope
questions.rationale: Essential context in high-need window (3-6s); affects how listener understands the environment and safety setup

questions.question: What markers or boundary indicators are visible on the ski slope?
questions.answer_key: Tall poles or gates marking the ski run boundaries
questions.rationale: Visible in high-need window (6-8.9s); helps listener understand slope structure and course layout

questions.question: What is the skier's body position and movement direction as they descend?
questions.answer_key: Skier moving downslope with forward-leaning posture, navigating the marked course
questions.rationale: Key visual information in high-need window (8.9-11.9s); describes active skiing technique and progression

questions.question: What structures or buildings are visible in the background of the ski area?
questions.answer_key: Dark buildings and structures visible at the edges of the illuminated slope
questions.rationale: Provides spatial context in high-need window (11.9-14.9s); helps listener understand the ski facility setting
